title: blob.rs: BlobUploadResponse type + URL template helper
description:
Why: upload_blob and download_blob need (1) a typed response struct for RFC 8620 §6.1 upload responses and (2) a URL template expander for {accountId}/{blobId}/{name} substitution per RFC 6570 Level 1.

What: Create new crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs with:
- BlobUploadResponse { account_id, blob_id, type_, size, sha256: Option<String> }
- fn expand_url_template(template: &str, vars: &[(&str, &str)]) -> String — percent-encodes each value using unreserved charset (ALPHA/DIGIT/-._~), replaces {varname}
- Add 'pub mod blob;' to src/lib.rs
- Add fixture tests/fixtures/blob/upload_response.json (hand-written from RFC 8620 §6.1 example)

Algorithm:
1. Create tests/fixtures/blob/ directory and upload_response.json fixture
2. Create src/blob.rs with BlobUploadResponse (Deserialize, Debug, Clone)
3. Add expand_url_template fn (no new deps: percent-encode manually with char::is_ascii_alphanumeric + '-'/'.'/'_'/'~')
4. Add unit tests for template expansion: {accountId} basic, {name} with spaces/slashes, {blobId} with special chars
5. Add pub mod blob; to lib.rs
6. Run cargo test
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; expand_url_template tests cover space/slash/non-ascii encoding; BlobUploadResponse deserializes fixture
